title: Lipchitz curve selection and its application to Thamrongthanyalak's open problem
summary: We solve an open problem posed in Thamrongthanyalak's paper on the definable Banach fixed point property. A Lipschitz curve selection is a key of our solution. In addition, we show a definable version of Caristi fixed point theorem.
publication_venue: Ann. Polon. Math. online first version, 2025
